## Control ID

Example: AAEF-AUZ-01

## Issue

Describe the problem, ambiguity, or proposed improvement.

## Suggested Change

Provide proposed wording if possible.

## Rationale

Explain why this improves authority, evidence, action assurance, auditability, or implementation clarity.
